entries.expected_output: The agent executes the monitor script for PR 340, parses the results, and reports GHA status.
assertions: The agent calls the monitor-pr.js script with argument '340'.
The agent parses the generated report status.
The agent outputs PR check statuses (pass/fail/pending) correctly.

entries.prompt: GHA check affected-tests failed on PR 340. Download the logs and fix the issue.
entries.expected_output: The agent detects the failure in affected-tests, downloads and parses the GHA logs, diagnoses the self-referencing package issue, and modifies node-checks.ts to add container symlinks.
assertions: The agent downloads GHA logs for the failed job.
The agent identifies the 'Cannot find package' error from the log.
The agent applies symlink creation commands to the build script in node-checks.ts.

entries.prompt: Monitor GHA run status for branch verify-affected-tests-fix-1 after pushing the fix.
entries.expected_output: The agent monitors the PR checks progress, waiting for pending runs to complete, and confirms once everything is green.
assertions: The agent polls/monitors GHA check state using the monitor script.
The agent waits or schedules checks until GHA reports completion status.
The agent verifies that the run completed successfully.
